summary: French POS Commercial Management System - Complete Testing Successful. All core POS functionality working perfectly: cash register management, product sales with automatic stock reduction, multi-payment methods, receipt generation, and dashboard integration. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI excellent with professional French interface, all features tested successfully.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with stats and caisse status (121,390 FCFA)
POS - Cash register status working (OPEN, 50,000 FCFA fond)
POS - Products grid with 4 products and category filters working
POS - Add products to cart with quantity controls working
POS - Complete payment process with Espèces, Mobile Money, Carte methods
POS - Receipt generation working (Ticket TK202603040005)
POS - Sales history integration showing daily totals (113,870 FCFA)
Stock automatically decreases after sale (Riz: 60→58, Huile: 30→29)
Products CRUD operations with search and filters working
Clients CRUD operations with client selection in POS
Stock movements creation automatically after POS sales
Inventory creation and validation working
Export CSV functionality for all entities (products, clients, sales, stock movements)
Backend API 100% success rate (23/23 tests passed)
Frontend navigation between all modules working
French localization and FCFA currency formatting perfect
Professional dark theme UI with excellent UX
Real-time dashboard updates showing sales data
Barcode/code search functionality working (PROD001 filter)
TVA calculation correct (18% tax)
Change calculation accurate (30,000 - 28,910 = 1,090 FCFA)
Client integration in POS (Boutique Mamadou selection)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor modal overlay issue in sales history)
